questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '160cde5b-fcc8-47be-8eeb-6a7813573cef' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '137b96d3-2ad3-4df9-b559-9ffe45f2926b'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '160cde5b-fcc8-47be-8eeb-6a7813573cef'; delete from question_items where id = '160cde5b-fcc8-47be-8eeb-6a7813573cef';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
